name: HetrixTools Server and Uptime Monitoring API
what_it_does: Server and uptime monitoring platform with REST API — enabling system administrators and hosting providers to monitor server uptime, website availability, SSL certificates, domain blacklists (email reputation), and server resources (CPU, RAM, disk) via lightweight agents, with API access for automation, white-label reports, and integration with alerting systems.
use_cases: Monitoring server uptime via HetrixTools API for hosting provider infrastructure management
Checking email blacklist status via HetrixTools API for email deliverability monitoring
Monitoring SSL certificate expiry via HetrixTools API for certificate renewal automation
Retrieving server resource metrics via HetrixTools Agent API for capacity planning
Building white-label monitoring dashboards via HetrixTools API for managed hosting clients
not_for: Application performance monitoring (HetrixTools is infrastructure/uptime, not APM)
Log analytics and tracing (use ELK stack or Datadog for log-based monitoring)
Complex incident management with escalation (use PagerDuty for on-call management)
best_when: A hosting provider, system administrator, or developer needs server uptime monitoring combined with email blacklist checking — where HetrixTools combines multiple monitoring types (uptime, blacklist, SSL, server resources) at competitive pricing.
avoid_when: You need full APM, log analytics, complex escalation policies, or application-level monitoring.

auth.notes: API key via Authorization: APIKey {key} header (custom header format). API key from HetrixTools account. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks for monitor status change alerts. Server agent (bash script) for resource monitoring. API v3 is current.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 15 uptime monitors, 15 blacklists, basic features
pricing.notes: Romanian company. Founded 2016. Bootstrapped. Hosting-industry focused. White-label support (custom branding for monitoring reports). Blacklist monitoring: 200+ email blacklists checked. Uptime from 10+ locations worldwide. Server monitoring agent (open source bash script on GitHub). SSL certificate monitoring. Domain expiry monitoring. Used by: web hosting providers, VPS providers, system admins. Very competitive pricing. Telegram, Slack, PagerDuty notification integrations. API v3 well-documented. Trusted by hosting industry.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with custom Authorization: APIKey {key} header. Webhooks. GDPR. Romanian company. Free tier (15 monitors). 60 req/min rate limit. Good developer documentation. White-label features.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Monitor reads idempotent by monitor ID. Blacklist reads idempotent. Monitor creation: check for existing before creating. Status history reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Non-standard auth header: Authorization: APIKey {key} — not Bearer or Basic; use exactly this format
Rate limit: 60 requests/minute per API key — implement rate limiting in automated workflows
Server monitoring requires installing agent (bash script) on monitored server — not pure API
Blacklist monitoring API returns check results asynchronously — may need to poll
Romanian company — GDPR compliant; EU data residency
White-label features require specific plan tier — check before building client-facing dashboards

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Romanian company (EU). Custom API key header auth. No OAuth2. EU data residency. Infrastructure monitoring data (server IPs, uptime) is operationally sensitive. Rate limiting (60 req/min) provides some protection. Webhook signature validation available. Free plan allows testing.
